execution.local_status: reproduction command reviewed; model tokenizer payloads are not bundled with this self-contained course
execution.integrity_rule: A result is valid only when all ten rows contain integer token_ids and offsets from the pinned payloads. Never substitute guessed IDs.

cases.risk: invalid byte is replaced before tokenization

decision_contract.invalid_inference: Fewer tokens alone proves the paired model is better.
decision_contract.blocking_failure: Any missing row, unpinned payload, guessed ID, or unexplained normalization change.
